metadata.description: Semantic diagram capabilities for creating, patching, narrating, and rendering structured visual diagrams. Agents can manipulate diagrams through JSON-based operations without managing UI layouts or coordinates.
metadata.summary: Create, patch, narrate, and render semantic diagrams through structured JSON operations.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Create Diagram
capabilities.description: Initialize an empty semantic diagram of a given type (e.g., concept, architecture, mindmap).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Diagram type. Examples: concept, architecture, mindmap.

output.description: A new empty CanonicalDiagram JSON object with the specified type.

capabilities.name: Patch Diagram
capabilities.description: Surgically add or remove nodes and edges from an existing diagram. Preferred invocation: pipe a JSON DiagramPatch to stdin with --patch-stdin.

parameters.name: inputPath
parameters.description: Path to the existing diagram JSON file.

parameters.name: patchStdin
parameters.description: When true, read a JSON DiagramPatch object from stdin. This is the recommended invocation pattern for agents.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Optional output path to write the patched diagram. When omitted, result goes to stdout.

output.description: The patched CanonicalDiagram JSON object. Also written to --output path if specified.

capabilities.name: Narrate Diagram
capabilities.description: Read a semantic diagram and produce a textual human-readable summary of nodes and relations. Accepts diagram JSON from file (--input) or stdin.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Diagram JSON file path. When omitted, reads diagram JSON from stdin.

output.description: A human-readable narrative describing the diagram's nodes, edges, and structure.

capabilities.name: Render Diagram
capabilities.description: Transform a semantic diagram into a visual format such as Mermaid.js. Accepts diagram JSON from file (--input) or stdin.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Diagram JSON file path. When omitted, reads diagram JSON from stdin.

output.description: The diagram rendered in the specified format (default: Mermaid flowchart).

constraints.description: Diagrams are semantic structures with typed nodes and edges. They do not carry layout, styling, or coordinate information.
After patching, the diagram is validated for structural integrity. Edges referencing non-existent nodes will cause an error.

triggers.description: When work involves creating, editing, or rendering semantic diagrams.
When nodes or edges need to be added or removed from an existing diagram.
When a semantic diagram needs to be visualized as Mermaid or another format.
When architecture or system diagrams need to be created or edited programmatically.
